name: INTERPACE BIOSCIENCES, INC.
summary: Interpace Biosciences, Inc. is a molecular diagnostics company focused on cancer testing, primarily thyroid cancer. Its key products include ThyGeNEXT and ThyraMIR v2, molecular diagnostic tests for thyroid cancer. The company previously offered PancraGEN, a pancreatic cancer test, which lost Medicare reimbursement coverage effective April 24, 2025, leading to its discontinuance. Revenue is derived entirely from clinical diagnostic services.
